body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<caps>
  <server title="Prowlarr" />
  <limits default="100" max="100" />
  <searching>
    <search available="yes" supportedParams="q" searchEngine="raw" />
    <tv-search available="yes" supportedParams="q,season,ep" searchEngine="raw" />
    <movie-search available="yes" supportedParams="q" searchEngine="raw" />
    <music-search available="yes" supportedParams="q" searchEngine="raw" />
    <audio-search available="yes" supportedParams="q" searchEngine="raw" />
    <book-search available="yes" supportedParams="q" searchEngine="raw" />
  </searching>
  <categories>
    <category id="2000" name="Movies">
      <subcat id="2020" name="Movies/Other" />
    </category>
    <category id="3000" name="Audio" />
    <category id="4000" name="PC">
      <subcat id="4020" name="PC/ISO" />
      <subcat id="4050" name="PC/Games" />
    </category>
    <category id="5000" name="TV">
      <subcat id="5070" name="TV/Anime" />
    </category>
    <category id="7000" name="Books" />
    <category id="8000" name="Other" />
    <category id="140679" name="Anime" />
    <category id="140679" name="Anime" />
    <category id="125996" name="Anime - Anime Music Video" />
    <category id="125996" name="Anime - Anime Music Video" />
    <category id="127720" name="Anime - English-translated" />
    <category id="127720" name="Anime - English-translated" />
    <category id="131088" name="Anime - Non-English-translated" />
    <category id="131088" name="Anime - Non-English-translated" />
    <category id="134634" name="Anime - Raw" />
    <category id="134634" name="Anime - Raw" />
    <category id="145414" name="Audio" />
    <category id="118685" name="Audio - Lossless" />
    <category id="155285" name="Audio - Lossy" />
    <category id="100920" name="Literature" />
    <category id="156719" name="Literature  English-translated" />
    <category id="111160" name="Literature - Non-English-translated" />
    <category id="117084" name="Literature - Raw" />
    <category id="129933" name="Live Action" />
    <category id="101340" name="Live Action - English-translated" />
    <category id="150332" name="Live Action - Idol/Promotional Video" />
    <category id="150562" name="Live Action - Non-English-translated" />
    <category id="150452" name="Live Action - Raw" />
    <category id="134686" name="Pictures" />
    <category id="131360" name="Pictures - Graphics" />
    <category id="109829" name="Pictures - Photos" />
    <category id="117318" name="Software" />
    <category id="130420" name="Software - Applications" />
    <category id="103955" name="Software - Games" />
  </categories>
  <tags />
</caps>
